features: CHEMICAL FREE CLEANING!: Urban Kicks Trainer Eraser, removes marks and scuffs with ease, no harsh chemicals, just add a small amount of water to activate the sponge & clean. A new product from the team @WeAreUrbanKicks
OUT OF BOX FOOTWEAR: Urban Kicks Trainer Eraser, use after each wear to keep footwear looking box fresh clean
KICKS IN TIP TOP CONDITION!: Use Urban Kicks Trainers Erasers with Urban Kicks Wipes and Rain & Stain Barrier Spray to keep your kicks into tip top condition ready to get out and impress

EASY TO USE: Simply moisten the eraser under running cold water, squeeze to remove the excess water. Gently rub the eraser over the mark or scuffed area. Until removed. Discard the eraser when the surface becomes too dirty to use. Do not use with bleach or other cleaning liquids.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pack of 3 Urban Kicks Trainer Erasers. Simply add cold water to activate. Air dry after each use
description: Product Description Urban Kicks Trainer Eraser, removes marks and scuffs with ease, no harsh chemicals, just add a small amount of water to activate the sponge & clean. A new product from the team @WeAreUrbanKicks. Use after each wear to keep footwear looking box fresh clean. Use Urban Kicks Trainers Erasers with Urban Kicks Wipes and Rain & Stain Barrier Spray to keep your kicks into tip top condition ready to get out and impress. Pack of 3 Urban Kicks Trainer Erasers. Simply add cold water to activate. Air dry after each use Ingredients melamine polymer foam
